register.title: Create your account
register.checkEmail: If the address is valid, we've sent an activation email. Please check your inbox.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.checkEmail: If the address is valid, we've sent a password-reset link. Please check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in with your new password.

activate.title: Activate your account
activate.success: Your account has been activated. You can sign in now.
activate.error: This activation link is invalid or has expired. Try signing in or request a new one.

errors.notActivated: This account is not activated yet. Check your inbox.
errors.invalidResetToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
